< Home >

POST restapi/personal/yourfiles/files/zip/v1

Start zipping files in your files area

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.YourFiles.ZipRequest
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
FileIds

The file identifiers of the files to be included in the zip archive.

 Collection of integer

None.
FolderIds

The folder identifiers of the folders to be included in the zip archive.

 Collection of integer

None.

Request Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "FileIds": [
    1,
    2
  ],
  "FolderIds": [
    1,
    2
  ]
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<ZipRequest xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.YourFiles">
  <FileIds xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
    <d2p1:int>1</d2p1:int>
    <d2p1:int>2</d2p1:int>
  </FileIds>
  <FolderIds xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
    <d2p1:int>1</d2p1:int>
    <d2p1:int>2</d2p1:int>
  </FolderIds>
</ZipRequest>

application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Sample: 
No sample available

Response Information

Resource Description

The zip file job

Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.YourFiles.ZipFileJobModel
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
JobId

The job identifier

 integer

None.
FileRepoId

The file repository identifier for the zip file

 globally unique identifier

None.
ZipFileName

The name of the zip file

 string

None.
Created

When the job was created

 date

None.
Status

Status for the job

 string

None.
DownloadUrl

The url to download the file if status is completed

 string

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "JobId": 1,
  "FileRepoId": "8caa46bf-6eef-42f4-933b-b455c7ede4c2",
  "ZipFileName": "sample string 3",
  "Created": "2026-03-07T09:02:56Z",
  "Status": "sample string 5",
  "DownloadUrl": "sample string 6"
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<ZipFileJobModel xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.YourFiles">
  <Created>2026-03-07T09:02:56Z</Created>
  <DownloadUrl>sample string 6</DownloadUrl>
  <FileRepoId>8caa46bf-6eef-42f4-933b-b455c7ede4c2</FileRepoId>
  <JobId>1</JobId>
  <Status>sample string 5</Status>
  <ZipFileName>sample string 3</ZipFileName>
</ZipFileJobModel>
